headline: Dollar Tree’s (NASDAQ:DLTR) Q4 CY2025 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
summary: Discount treasure-hunt retailer Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 9% year on year to $5.45 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $4.95 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.56 per share was 1.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

raw.headline: Dollar Tree’s (NASDAQ:DLTR) Q4 CY2025 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
raw.summary: Discount treasure-hunt retailer Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 9% year on year to $5.45 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $4.95 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.56 per share was 1.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
